name: Chicken Wings W/Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken wings in water on high heat for 10-12 minutes.
2. Add oil and cook for 15 minutes on medium heat or until the chicken is brown on both sides.
3. Reduce heat to medium-high, drizzle all wings with sweet dark soy sauce one tablespoon at a time.
4. Stir four or five times, making sure that all wings are coated.
5. Add remaining ingredients. Simmer on low heat for 5-8 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat and let stand 3-4 minutes before serving warm with hot cooked rice.
